final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: promotional-poster
Asset type: e-commerce marketing poster, 16:9 landscape
Primary request: complex but organized promotional poster for cross-border e-commerce sale with artistic typography and layered text effects
Scene/backdrop: dynamic commercial backdrop with depth layers, abstract geometric shapes and gradient flows
Subject: product showcase (headphones or smartwatch) overlapping and partially obscuring artistic text, creating depth
Style/medium: modern graphic design, digital illustration, layered typography poster
Composition/framing: 16:9 landscape, balanced chaos with focal product in foreground, text layers receding into background
Lighting/mood: vibrant energetic lighting with subtle shadows for depth, exciting promotional atmosphere
Color palette: bold primary colors with complementary accents, high contrast for readability
Materials/textures: glossy product surfaces, matte paper texture for text, subtle grain overlay
Text (verbatim): "跨境电商促销海报"
Constraints: must have artistic typography, must have layered/stacked fonts, product must partially block some text, complex but not cluttered
Avoid: pure chaos without hierarchy, flat design without depth, unreadable text, watermark
